description: Manufacturing Round 2 Run 2: MES + Quality DSL models (routing, operations, work orders, equipment, IQC/PQC/FQC, batch traceability)

userStories.title: Add pe_routing + pe_operation models with full config
userStories.description:
Add two related models: pe_routing (process routing definition) and pe_operation (operation steps, child of routing).

1. models.json — append 2 models:

a) pe_routing:
{
  "code": "pe_routing",
  "displayName:zh-CN": "工艺路线",
  "displayName:en": "Routing",
  "description": "Process routing definition for products",
  "modelType": "ENTITY",
  "extension": {
    "icon": "Route",
    "category": "pcba-erp",
    "titleField": "pe_rt_name",
    "subtitleField": "pe_rt_product_id"
  }
}

b) pe_operation:
{
  "code": "pe_operation",
  "displayName:zh-CN": "工序",
  "displayName:en": "Operation",
  "description": "Operation steps within a routing",
  "modelType": "ENTITY",
  "extension": {
    "icon": "ListOrdered",
    "category": "pcba-erp",
    "parentModel": "pe_routing",
    "parentField": "pe_op_routing_id"
  }
}

2. fields.json — append fields:

pe_routing fields (7):
- pe_rt_code: STRING, required, maxLength 50, searchable+sortable
- pe_rt_name: STRING, required, maxLength 200, searchable+sortable
- pe_rt_product_id: REFERENCE→pe_product (targetField pe_product_name), required
- pe_rt_version: INTEGER, defaultValue "1", constraints min:1
- pe_rt_status: ENUM, dictCode pe_enable_status, defaultValue ENABLED, searchable
- pe_rt_total_std_time_min: DECIMAL, constraints min:0, extension readOnly true
- pe_rt_remark: STRING, maxLength 500

pe_operation fields (9):
- pe_op_routing_id: REFERENCE→pe_routing (targetField pe_rt_name), required
- pe_op_seq: INTEGER, required, constraints min:1. Operation sequence number.
- pe_op_name: STRING, required, maxLength 200
- pe_op_type: ENUM, dictCode pe_operation_type, required
- pe_op_std_time_min: DECIMAL, required, constraints min:0. Standard time in minutes.
- pe_op_resource_type: STRING, maxLength 50. Required resource type.
- pe_op_is_bottleneck: BOOLEAN, defaultValue "false"
- pe_op_is_quality_checkpoint: BOOLEAN, defaultValue "false"
- pe_op_description: STRING, maxLength 1000

3. commands.json — 7 commands:
pe_routing: pe:create_routing (CREATE, autoSet pe_rt_status ENABLED), pe:update_routing (UPDATE), pe:delete_routing (DELETE)
pe_operation: pe:create_operation (CREATE), pe:update_operation (UPDATE), pe:delete_operation (DELETE)
pe:activate_routing (STATE_TRANSITION pe_rt_status from DISABLED to ENABLED)
pe:deactivate_routing (STATE_TRANSITION pe_rt_status from ENABLED to DISABLED)

All permissions PE.mes.manage.

4. bindings.json — 16 bindings (7 for routing + 9 for operation). pe_op_routing_id visible:false.

5. pages.json — pe_routing_list + pe_routing_form (with sub-table for operations). Operations should appear as inline sub-table in the routing form.
acceptanceCriteria: pe_operation has parentModel pe_routing and parentField pe_op_routing_id in extension
fields.json contains 7 pe_rt_* and 9 pe_op_* fields
pe:activate_routing and pe:deactivate_routing are STATE_TRANSITION commands
userStories.notes: Config-only. pe_operation_type dict added in US-016. The parentModel/parentField pattern makes operations appear as a sub-table in the routing form. Follow pe_bom/pe_bom_line pattern for parent-child relationship.

userStories.title: Add pe_work_order_op model with full config
userStories.description:
Add pe_work_order_op model — work order operation instances (child of pe_production_plan, the existing work order model).

1. models.json:
{
  "code": "pe_work_order_op",
  "displayName:zh-CN": "工单工序",
  "displayName:en": "Work Order Operation",
  "description": "Work order operation instances: tracks each operation step execution",
  "modelType": "ENTITY",
  "extension": {
    "icon": "PlayCircle",
    "category": "pcba-erp",
    "parentModel": "pe_production_plan",
    "parentField": "pe_woo_work_order_id"
  }
}

2. fields.json — 16 fields:
- pe_woo_work_order_id: REFERENCE→pe_production_plan (targetField pe_pp_code), required
- pe_woo_operation_id: REFERENCE→pe_operation (targetField pe_op_name)
- pe_woo_seq: INTEGER, required, constraints min:1
- pe_woo_name: STRING, required, maxLength 200
- pe_woo_status: ENUM, dictCode pe_work_op_status, defaultValue PENDING, searchable
- pe_woo_resource_id: REFERENCE→pe_resource (targetField pe_res_name)
- pe_woo_planned_start: DATETIME
- pe_woo_planned_end: DATETIME
- pe_woo_actual_start: DATETIME, extension readOnly true
- pe_woo_actual_end: DATETIME, extension readOnly true
- pe_woo_planned_qty: DECIMAL, constraints min:0
- pe_woo_actual_qty: DECIMAL, defaultValue "0", extension readOnly true
- pe_woo_defect_qty: DECIMAL, defaultValue "0", extension readOnly true
- pe_woo_yield_rate: DECIMAL, extension readOnly true. Computed: (actual-defect)/actual*100
- pe_woo_operator: STRING, maxLength 100
- pe_woo_remark: STRING, maxLength 500

3. commands.json — 4 commands:
- pe:create_work_order_op (CREATE, permissions PE.mes.manage)
- pe:start_operation (STATE_TRANSITION, stateField pe_woo_status, fromStates ["PENDING","QUEUED"], toState "IN_PROGRESS", handler "pe:start_operation", permissions PE.mes.manage)
- pe:complete_operation (STATE_TRANSITION, stateField pe_woo_status, fromStates ["IN_PROGRESS"], toState "COMPLETED", handler "pe:complete_operation", permissions PE.mes.manage)
- pe:skip_operation (STATE_TRANSITION, stateField pe_woo_status, fromStates ["PENDING","QUEUED"], toState "SKIPPED", permissions PE.mes.manage)

4. bindings.json — 16 bindings. Read-only fields (actual_start, actual_end, actual_qty, defect_qty, yield_rate) have editable:false.

5. pages.json — pe_work_order_op_list (columns: work_order_id, seq, name, status TAG, resource_id, planned_start, actual_start, planned_qty, actual_qty, defect_qty, yield_rate. Actions: start visible when PENDING/QUEUED, complete visible when IN_PROGRESS, skip visible when PENDING/QUEUED)
acceptanceCriteria: models.json contains pe_work_order_op with parentModel pe_production_plan
Read-only fields have editable:false in bindings
pe_work_order_op_list has correct action buttons with visibleWhen
userStories.notes: Config-only. Handlers pe:start_operation and pe:complete_operation implemented in Run 4. pe_work_op_status dict in US-016. pe_production_plan already exists with code field pe_pp_code.

userStories.title: Add pe_work_report model with full config
userStories.description:
Add pe_work_report model — work reporting records for each operation.

1. models.json:
{
  "code": "pe_work_report",
  "displayName:zh-CN": "报工记录",
  "displayName:en": "Work Report",
  "description": "Work reporting records for production operation tracking",
  "modelType": "ENTITY",
  "extension": {
    "icon": "FileText",
    "category": "pcba-erp",
    "titleField": "pe_wr_work_order_op_id",
    "subtitleField": "pe_wr_operator"
  }
}

2. fields.json — 10 fields:
- pe_wr_work_order_op_id: REFERENCE→pe_work_order_op (targetField pe_woo_name), required
- pe_wr_operator: STRING, required, maxLength 100
- pe_wr_resource_id: REFERENCE→pe_resource (targetField pe_res_name)
- pe_wr_report_time: DATETIME, required
- pe_wr_qty_completed: DECIMAL, required, constraints min:0
- pe_wr_qty_defect: DECIMAL, defaultValue "0", constraints min:0
- pe_wr_duration_min: DECIMAL, constraints min:0
- pe_wr_shift: ENUM, dictCode pe_shift, defaultValue DAY
- pe_wr_remark: STRING, maxLength 500
- pe_wr_defect_codes: STRING, maxLength 500. Comma-separated defect code list.

3. commands.json — 3 commands: pe:create_work_report (CREATE, handler "pe:report_work"), pe:update_work_report (UPDATE), pe:delete_work_report (DELETE). All permissions PE.mes.manage.

4. bindings.json — 10 bindings.

5. pages.json — pe_work_report_list + pe_work_report_form
userStories.notes: Config-only. pe:report_work handler aggregates qty to parent work_order_op in Run 4. pe_shift dict was added in Run 1 US-008.

userStories.title: Add pe_equipment + pe_equipment_maintenance models with full config
userStories.description:
Add two related models: pe_equipment (master data) and pe_equipment_maintenance (child maintenance records).

1. models.json — 2 models:

a) pe_equipment:
{
  "code": "pe_equipment",
  "displayName:zh-CN": "设备",
  "displayName:en": "Equipment",
  "description": "Production equipment master data",
  "modelType": "ENTITY",
  "extension": {
    "icon": "Monitor",
    "category": "pcba-erp",
    "titleField": "pe_eq_name",
    "subtitleField": "pe_eq_type"
  }
}

b) pe_equipment_maintenance:
{
  "code": "pe_equipment_maintenance",
  "displayName:zh-CN": "维保记录",
  "displayName:en": "Maintenance Record",
  "description": "Equipment maintenance and calibration records",
  "modelType": "ENTITY",
  "extension": {
    "icon": "Wrench",
    "category": "pcba-erp",
    "parentModel": "pe_equipment",
    "parentField": "pe_em_equipment_id"
  }
}

2. fields.json:

pe_equipment fields (11):
- pe_eq_code: STRING, required, maxLength 50, searchable+sortable
- pe_eq_name: STRING, required, maxLength 200, searchable+sortable
- pe_eq_type: ENUM, dictCode pe_equipment_type, required, searchable
- pe_eq_model: STRING, maxLength 200
- pe_eq_manufacturer: STRING, maxLength 200
- pe_eq_serial_no: STRING, maxLength 100
- pe_eq_line_id: STRING, maxLength 50. Production line.
- pe_eq_resource_id: REFERENCE→pe_resource (targetField pe_res_name)
- pe_eq_status: ENUM, dictCode pe_equipment_status, defaultValue IDLE, searchable
- pe_eq_purchase_date: DATE
- pe_eq_next_maintenance_date: DATE

pe_equipment_maintenance fields (9):
- pe_em_equipment_id: REFERENCE→pe_equipment (targetField pe_eq_name), required
- pe_em_type: ENUM, dictCode pe_maintenance_type, required
- pe_em_scheduled_date: DATE, required
- pe_em_actual_date: DATE
- pe_em_duration_hours: DECIMAL, constraints min:0
- pe_em_technician: STRING, maxLength 100
- pe_em_description: STRING, maxLength 1000
- pe_em_cost: DECIMAL, constraints min:0
- pe_em_status: ENUM, dictCode pe_maintenance_status, defaultValue SCHEDULED

3. commands.json — 8 commands:
pe_equipment: pe:create_equipment, pe:update_equipment, pe:delete_equipment
pe_equipment_maintenance: pe:create_eq_maintenance, pe:update_eq_maintenance, pe:delete_eq_maintenance, pe:complete_eq_maintenance (STATE_TRANSITION pe_em_status from SCHEDULED/IN_PROGRESS to COMPLETED), pe:start_eq_maintenance (STATE_TRANSITION pe_em_status from SCHEDULED to IN_PROGRESS)
All permissions PE.equipment.manage.

4. bindings.json — 20 bindings. pe_em_equipment_id visible:false.

5. pages.json — pe_equipment_list + pe_equipment_form (with maintenance sub-table)
acceptanceCriteria: fields.json contains 11 pe_eq_* and 9 pe_em_* fields
userStories.notes: Config-only. Dicts pe_equipment_type, pe_equipment_status, pe_maintenance_type, pe_maintenance_status in US-016.

userStories.title: Add pe_iqc_order model with full config
userStories.description:
Add pe_iqc_order model — Incoming Quality Control for purchase receipts.

1. models.json:
{
  "code": "pe_iqc_order",
  "displayName:zh-CN": "来料检验",
  "displayName:en": "IQC Order",
  "description": "Incoming Quality Control inspection orders",
  "modelType": "ENTITY",
  "extension": {
    "icon": "ShieldCheck",
    "category": "pcba-erp",
    "titleField": "pe_iqc_code",
    "subtitleField": "pe_iqc_result"
  }
}

2. fields.json — 14 fields:
- pe_iqc_code: STRING, required, maxLength 50, searchable+sortable
- pe_iqc_receipt_id: REFERENCE→pe_warehouse_in (targetField pe_wh_in_code)
- pe_iqc_supplier_id: REFERENCE→pe_supplier (targetField pe_supplier_name)
- pe_iqc_material_id: REFERENCE→pe_product (targetField pe_product_name), required
- pe_iqc_material_name: STRING, maxLength 200. Denormalized.
- pe_iqc_qty_received: DECIMAL, required, constraints min:0
- pe_iqc_qty_inspected: DECIMAL, constraints min:0
- pe_iqc_qty_accepted: DECIMAL, constraints min:0
- pe_iqc_qty_rejected: DECIMAL, constraints min:0
- pe_iqc_aql_level: STRING, maxLength 50. E.g. "AQL 1.0"
- pe_iqc_result: ENUM, dictCode pe_qc_result, defaultValue PENDING, searchable
- pe_iqc_inspector: STRING, maxLength 100
- pe_iqc_date: DATE
- pe_iqc_remark: STRING, maxLength 1000

3. commands.json — 3 commands:
- pe:create_iqc_order (CREATE, autoSet pe_iqc_code AUTO_GENERATE "IQC-{yyyyMMdd}-{seq}", pe_iqc_result FIXED_VALUE PENDING, permissions PE.quality.manage)
- pe:update_iqc_order (UPDATE, permissions PE.quality.manage)
- pe:complete_iqc (STATE_TRANSITION, stateField pe_iqc_result, fromStates ["PENDING"], toState "PASS", handler "pe:complete_iqc", permissions PE.quality.manage, extension confirmMessage)

Note: pe:complete_iqc handler will set toState dynamically to PASS/FAIL/CONDITIONAL_ACCEPT based on inspection results.

4. bindings.json — 14 bindings. qty_accepted, qty_rejected should be editable in update.

5. pages.json — pe_iqc_order_list (columns: code, receipt_id, supplier_id, material_name, qty_received, qty_inspected, qty_accepted, qty_rejected, aql_level, result TAG, inspector, date. Actions: edit, complete visible when PENDING) + pe_iqc_order_form
acceptanceCriteria: pe_iqc_order_list has complete action visible when PENDING
userStories.notes: Config-only. pe:complete_iqc handler in Run 4. pe_qc_result dict in US-016. The STATE_TRANSITION toState is PASS in the command definition, but the handler overrides the actual state based on inspection qty comparison.

userStories.title: Add pe_pqc_record + pe_defect_record models with full config
userStories.description:
Add two quality models: pe_pqc_record (Process QC during manufacturing) and pe_defect_record (defect tracking).

1. models.json — 2 models:

a) pe_pqc_record:
{
  "code": "pe_pqc_record",
  "displayName:zh-CN": "过程检验",
  "displayName:en": "Process QC Record",
  "description": "Process quality control: AOI, SPI, X-Ray inspection records",
  "modelType": "ENTITY",
  "extension": {
    "icon": "ScanSearch",
    "category": "pcba-erp",
    "titleField": "pe_pqc_work_order_op_id",
    "subtitleField": "pe_pqc_type"
  }
}

b) pe_defect_record:
{
  "code": "pe_defect_record",
  "displayName:zh-CN": "缺陷记录",
  "displayName:en": "Defect Record",
  "description": "Defect tracking and root cause analysis",
  "modelType": "ENTITY",
  "extension": {
    "icon": "Bug",
    "category": "pcba-erp",
    "titleField": "pe_dr_defect_type",
    "subtitleField": "pe_dr_status"
  }
}

2. fields.json:

pe_pqc_record fields (10):
- pe_pqc_work_order_op_id: REFERENCE→pe_work_order_op (targetField pe_woo_name), required
- pe_pqc_type: ENUM, dictCode pe_pqc_type, required
- pe_pqc_qty_inspected: DECIMAL, required, constraints min:0
- pe_pqc_qty_pass: DECIMAL, constraints min:0
- pe_pqc_qty_fail: DECIMAL, constraints min:0
- pe_pqc_defect_rate: DECIMAL, extension readOnly true. Computed.
- pe_pqc_result: ENUM, dictCode pe_qc_result, defaultValue PENDING
- pe_pqc_inspector: STRING, maxLength 100
- pe_pqc_date: DATE
- pe_pqc_remark: STRING, maxLength 1000

pe_defect_record fields (11):
- pe_dr_source_type: ENUM, dictCode pe_defect_source, required
- pe_dr_source_id: STRING, maxLength 50. Reference to IQC/PQC/FQC record ID.
- pe_dr_product_id: REFERENCE→pe_product (targetField pe_product_name), required
- pe_dr_batch_no: STRING, maxLength 100, searchable
- pe_dr_defect_type: ENUM, dictCode pe_defect_type, required, searchable
- pe_dr_location: STRING, maxLength 200. Ref designator on PCB.
- pe_dr_severity: ENUM, dictCode pe_severity, required
- pe_dr_root_cause: STRING, maxLength 1000
- pe_dr_corrective_action: STRING, maxLength 1000
- pe_dr_status: ENUM, dictCode pe_defect_status, defaultValue OPEN, searchable
- pe_dr_remark: STRING, maxLength 500

3. commands.json — 7 commands:
pe_pqc_record: pe:create_pqc_record (CREATE), pe:update_pqc_record (UPDATE), pe:delete_pqc_record (DELETE)
pe_defect_record: pe:create_defect_record (CREATE, autoSet pe_dr_status FIXED_VALUE OPEN), pe:update_defect_record (UPDATE), pe:resolve_defect (STATE_TRANSITION pe_dr_status from OPEN/ANALYZING to RESOLVED), pe:close_defect (STATE_TRANSITION pe_dr_status from RESOLVED to CLOSED)
All permissions PE.quality.manage.

4. bindings.json — 21 bindings.

5. pages.json — pe_pqc_record_list + pe_pqc_record_form + pe_defect_record_list + pe_defect_record_form. Defect list should show severity with color tags.
acceptanceCriteria: fields.json contains 10 pe_pqc_* and 11 pe_dr_* fields
pe:resolve_defect and pe:close_defect are STATE_TRANSITION commands
userStories.notes: Config-only. Dicts pe_pqc_type, pe_defect_source, pe_defect_type, pe_defect_status in US-016. pe_severity dict was added in Run 1.

userStories.title: Add pe_fqc_order + pe_batch_trace models with full config
userStories.description:
Add pe_fqc_order (Final Quality Control) and pe_batch_trace (batch traceability) models.

1. models.json — 2 models:

a) pe_fqc_order:
{
  "code": "pe_fqc_order",
  "displayName:zh-CN": "成品检验",
  "displayName:en": "FQC Order",
  "description": "Final Quality Control inspection orders",
  "modelType": "ENTITY",
  "extension": {
    "icon": "BadgeCheck",
    "category": "pcba-erp",
    "titleField": "pe_fqc_code",
    "subtitleField": "pe_fqc_result"
  }
}

b) pe_batch_trace:
{
  "code": "pe_batch_trace",
  "displayName:zh-CN": "批次追溯",
  "displayName:en": "Batch Trace",
  "description": "Batch traceability: production, material sources, quality results",
  "modelType": "ENTITY",
  "extension": {
    "icon": "Fingerprint",
    "category": "pcba-erp",
    "titleField": "pe_bt_batch_no",
    "subtitleField": "pe_bt_status"
  }
}

2. fields.json:

pe_fqc_order fields (10):
- pe_fqc_code: STRING, required, maxLength 50, searchable+sortable
- pe_fqc_work_order_id: REFERENCE→pe_production_plan (targetField pe_pp_code), required
- pe_fqc_product_id: REFERENCE→pe_product (targetField pe_product_name), required
- pe_fqc_batch_no: STRING, maxLength 100, searchable
- pe_fqc_qty_inspected: DECIMAL, constraints min:0
- pe_fqc_qty_pass: DECIMAL, constraints min:0
- pe_fqc_qty_fail: DECIMAL, constraints min:0
- pe_fqc_result: ENUM, dictCode pe_qc_result, defaultValue PENDING, searchable
- pe_fqc_inspector: STRING, maxLength 100
- pe_fqc_date: DATE

pe_batch_trace fields (8):
- pe_bt_batch_no: STRING, required, maxLength 100, searchable+sortable
- pe_bt_product_id: REFERENCE→pe_product (targetField pe_product_name), required
- pe_bt_work_order_id: REFERENCE→pe_production_plan (targetField pe_pp_code)
- pe_bt_qty_produced: DECIMAL, constraints min:0
- pe_bt_material_batches: STRING, maxLength 2000. JSON array of input batch numbers.
- pe_bt_production_date: DATE, required
- pe_bt_quality_summary: STRING, maxLength 2000. JSON summary of quality results.
- pe_bt_status: ENUM, dictCode pe_batch_status, defaultValue IN_PRODUCTION

3. commands.json — 7 commands:
pe_fqc_order: pe:create_fqc_order (CREATE, autoSet pe_fqc_code AUTO_GENERATE "FQC-{yyyyMMdd}-{seq}", pe_fqc_result FIXED_VALUE PENDING), pe:update_fqc_order (UPDATE), pe:complete_fqc (STATE_TRANSITION pe_fqc_result from PENDING to PASS, handler "pe:complete_fqc", confirmMessage)
pe_batch_trace: pe:create_batch_trace (CREATE), pe:update_batch_trace (UPDATE), pe:release_batch (STATE_TRANSITION pe_bt_status from QC_PASSED to RELEASED), pe:fail_batch (STATE_TRANSITION pe_bt_status from QC_PENDING to QC_FAILED)
All permissions PE.quality.manage.

4. bindings.json — 18 bindings.

5. pages.json — pe_fqc_order_list + pe_fqc_order_form + pe_batch_trace_list + pe_batch_trace_form
acceptanceCriteria: fields.json contains 10 pe_fqc_* and 8 pe_bt_* fields
userStories.notes: Config-only. pe:complete_fqc handler in Run 4. pe_batch_status dict in US-016.

userStories.title: Add MES + Quality dicts, permissions, and menus
userStories.description:
Add all new dictionaries, permissions, and menu entries for MES and Quality modules.

1. dicts.json — append these dicts:

a) pe_operation_type:
  SMT (SMT贴片/SMT, #1890ff), REFLOW (回流焊/Reflow, #fa8c16), AOI (AOI检测/AOI, #52c41a), THT (插件/Through-Hole, #722ed1), WAVE (波峰焊/Wave Solder, #13c2c2), ICT (ICT测试/ICT Test, #eb2f96), FCT (FCT测试/FCT Test, #f5222d), ASSEMBLY (组装/Assembly, #2f54eb), PACKAGING (包装/Packaging, #595959), OTHER (其他/Other, #d9d9d9)

b) pe_work_op_status:
  PENDING (待开始/Pending, #d9d9d9), QUEUED (排队中/Queued, #1890ff), IN_PROGRESS (进行中/In Progress, #fa8c16), COMPLETED (已完成/Completed, #52c41a), SKIPPED (已跳过/Skipped, #595959)

c) pe_equipment_type:
  SMT (贴片机/SMT Machine, #1890ff), REFLOW (回流焊炉/Reflow Oven, #fa8c16), AOI (AOI设备/AOI Machine, #52c41a), WAVE (波峰焊机/Wave Solder, #13c2c2), ICT (ICT测试仪/ICT Tester, #eb2f96), FCT (FCT测试仪/FCT Tester, #f5222d), PRINTER (印刷机/Printer, #722ed1), OVEN (烤箱/Oven, #fa541c), OTHER (其他/Other, #d9d9d9)

d) pe_equipment_status:
  RUNNING (运行中/Running, #52c41a), IDLE (空闲/Idle, #1890ff), MAINTENANCE (维护中/Maintenance, #fa8c16), BREAKDOWN (故障/Breakdown, #ff4d4f)

e) pe_maintenance_type:
  PREVENTIVE (预防性/Preventive, #1890ff), CORRECTIVE (纠正性/Corrective, #fa8c16), CALIBRATION (校准/Calibration, #722ed1)

f) pe_maintenance_status:
  SCHEDULED (已计划/Scheduled, #d9d9d9), IN_PROGRESS (进行中/In Progress, #fa8c16), COMPLETED (已完成/Completed, #52c41a)

g) pe_qc_result:
  PENDING (待检/Pending, #d9d9d9), PASS (合格/Pass, #52c41a), FAIL (不合格/Fail, #ff4d4f), CONDITIONAL_ACCEPT (有条件接收/Conditional Accept, #fa8c16)

h) pe_pqc_type:
  SPI (SPI检测/SPI, #1890ff), AOI (AOI检测/AOI, #52c41a), XRAY (X-Ray检测/X-Ray, #722ed1), VISUAL (目检/Visual, #fa8c16)

i) pe_defect_source:
  IQC (来料检/IQC, #1890ff), PQC (过程检/PQC, #fa8c16), FQC (成品检/FQC, #52c41a), FIELD (市场退货/Field Return, #ff4d4f)

j) pe_defect_type:
  MISSING (漏件/Missing, #ff4d4f), OFFSET (偏移/Offset, #fa8c16), SOLDER_BRIDGE (连锡/Solder Bridge, #fa541c), COLD_SOLDER (虚焊/Cold Solder, #eb2f96), CRACK (裂纹/Crack, #f5222d), WRONG_PART (错件/Wrong Part, #722ed1), TOMBSTONE (立碑/Tombstone, #13c2c2), OTHER (其他/Other, #d9d9d9)

k) pe_defect_status:
  OPEN (待处理/Open, #ff4d4f), ANALYZING (分析中/Analyzing, #fa8c16), RESOLVED (已解决/Resolved, #52c41a), CLOSED (已关闭/Closed, #d9d9d9)

l) pe_batch_status:
  IN_PRODUCTION (生产中/In Production, #1890ff), QC_PENDING (待检/QC Pending, #fa8c16), QC_PASSED (检验合格/QC Passed, #52c41a), QC_FAILED (检验不合格/QC Failed, #ff4d4f), RELEASED (已放行/Released, #389e0d)
